LOGIN.TITLE: Clear Songs
LOGIN.TAGLINE: Manage your Spotify library with precision and ease
LOGIN.DISCLAIMER: We only access your library to help you manage it. All deletions are backed up.

DASHBOARD.TITLE: Library Overview
DASHBOARD.SUBTITLE: Manage and analyze your Spotify library
DASHBOARD.NO_ARTISTS_MSG: No artists match your search criteria. Try adjusting your filters.
DASHBOARD.DELETE_ARTIST_MSG: Are you sure you want to delete all {{count}} tracks from {{name}}?

PLAYLISTS.TITLE: Playlist Management
PLAYLISTS.SUBTITLE: Execute bulk playlist operations to clean your Spotify playlists
PLAYLISTS.TARGET_DESC: Paste the Spotify playlist ID you want to clean
PLAYLISTS.SELECT_DESC: Choose a playlist from your library to clean
PLAYLISTS.MANUAL_HELP: Use the alphanumeric ID from the Spotify playlist URL
PLAYLISTS.ERR_PATTERN: Spotify IDs only contain letters and numbers
PLAYLISTS.DETAIL_CLEAR_DESC: Deletes every track from the selected playlist but keeps them in your liked songs.
PLAYLISTS.DETAIL_CLEAR_LIB_DESC: Deletes tracks from both the playlist and your saved library. The Go backend stores a backup before removal so you can recover songs when needed.
PLAYLISTS.NOTE_1: You must own or control the playlist to delete its tracks
PLAYLISTS.NOTE_2: Keep this tab open until the request finishes
PLAYLISTS.NOTE_3: Large playlists may take a few seconds due to Spotify rate limits
PLAYLISTS.ACTION_CLEAR_MSG: Remove every track inside the selected playlist. The tracks will remain saved in your library.
PLAYLISTS.ACTION_CLEAR_LIB_MSG: Remove playlist tracks AND delete the same songs from your saved library. A backup is stored automatically.
PLAYLISTS.ACTION_CLEAR_ERROR: Unable to remove tracks from playlist. Please try again.
PLAYLISTS.ACTION_CLEAR_LIB_SUCCESS: Playlist and library tracks removed successfully
PLAYLISTS.ACTION_CLEAR_LIB_ERROR: Unable to delete tracks from playlist and library. Please try again.
PLAYLISTS.LOAD_ERROR: Failed to load playlists. You can still enter a playlist ID manually.

TRACKS.TITLE: Track Management
TRACKS.SUBTITLE: Remove tracks based on the number of songs per artist
TRACKS.RANGE_DESC: Remove tracks based on the number of songs per artist
TRACKS.PRESETS_DESC: Select a preset to quickly fill the range fields
TRACKS.CUSTOM_DESC: Define your own range by setting minimum and/or maximum track counts
TRACKS.ERR_RANGE: Maximum must be greater than or equal to minimum
TRACKS.HOW_1: This tool removes tracks from artists based on how many songs you have from them
TRACKS.HOW_2: For example, setting min=1 and max=1 removes all artists with only one track (singles)
TRACKS.HOW_3: Setting min=20 removes all artists with 20 or more tracks
TRACKS.HOW_4: All deleted tracks are automatically backed up to the database
TRACKS.DELETE_MSG_RANGE: Are you sure you want to delete tracks from artists with {{min}} to {{max}} tracks?
TRACKS.DELETE_MSG_MIN: Are you sure you want to delete tracks from artists with at least {{min}} tracks?
TRACKS.DELETE_MSG_MAX: Are you sure you want to delete tracks from artists with at most {{max}} tracks?
TRACKS.DELETE_SUCCESS: Successfully deleted tracks in the specified range
TRACKS.NO_RANGE: Please specify at least one range value

ARTIST_MODAL.TITLE: Tracks by {{name}}
ARTIST_MODAL.NO_TRACKS: No tracks found for this artist.
ARTIST_MODAL.DELETE_ALBUM_MSG: Are you sure you want to delete all {{count}} tracks from "{{album}}"?
ARTIST_MODAL.DELETE_TRACK_MSG: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}" from your library?
